app.name: GitHub Stats Visualizer
app.one_liner: Generates theme-aware SVG statistics images for GitHub profiles using GitHub Actions, including data from private repositories via user-provided tokens.

screens.name: Statistics Dashboard
screens.purpose: Display generated overview and language statistics images that adapt to GitHub's light/dark mode.
primary_actions: Access profile README with embedded stats

rust_commands.name: generate_stats_images
rust_commands.purpose: Trigger regeneration of statistics images via GitHub Actions workflow using Python scripts.

mvp_plan: week 1: Configure access to private repositories via user token
week 1: Implement SVG template rendering with theme-specific image tags
week 1: Set up GitHub Actions workflow to run Python stats generator
acceptance_tests: Generated images display correctly in both GitHub light and dark modes using #gh-light-mode-only and #gh-dark-mode-only URL fragments.
Statistics include contributions from private repositories when sufficient token permissions are granted.
